title: Shadow Agents: How SentinelOne Secures the AI Tools That Act Like Users

scripts.content:
| CDB APEX v37.0 Threat Hunt Query
index=* ((query IN ("dst.ip.address","dst.port.number","e.trim","endpoint.name","event.time","event.type","g.length","src.ip.address","src.port.number","src.process.cmdline"))) | stats count by src_ip, dest_ip, action | sort -count
